creator: ikariton@gmail.com
text:
I use FreeBSD ports to install Curl,it display the message.

# portinstall curl
[Gathering depends for ftp/curl
............................................ done]
curl-7.21.3_2: "/usr/ports/net/openldap24-sasl" non-existent --
dependency list incomplete
curl-7.21.3_2: "-sasl-client" non-existent -- dependency list incomplete
** Port marked as IGNORE: ftp/curl:
      may only use GNU TLS if OpenSSL support is disabled
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
      - ftp/curl

then the install stop
And I havd already install 
openldap-sasl-client-2.4.26 Open source LDAP client implementation with SASL2 support
